project_context.name: Bank Sampah
project_context.description: Civic directory web platform for waste recycling in Indonesia (Jakarta Barat).
project_context.tone: Civic-utility, practical, warm, trustworthy. Aims for a 'Gojek/Tokopedia clean utility' feel. Avoids generic eco-green-leaf cliches.

theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Indonesian Civic-Tech Utility
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A purely dark mode app feels too 'tech-bro' for standard households. A light theme provides clarity and accessibility for utility apps. Organic earthy tones (Terracotta and Forest Green) replace the generic 'neon eco green' to feel more grounded, warm, and distinctly Indonesian.

primary.description: Warm Terracotta. Used for primary CTAs like 'Cek Harga', WhatsApp buttons, and active states. Highly visible and energetic.

secondary.description: Deep Forest Green. Used for badges, verified status, and secondary highlights. Feels stable and environmentally conscious without being preachy.

rules: Headings must always use Plus Jakarta Sans. Do not use Inter.
Never center-align long paragraphs. Left-align dense content.
Ensure robust line height for Bahas Indonesia content (leading-relaxed for body).

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Mobile-First (375px primary target). Desktop uses Bento-grid structure.
spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-5xl lg:max-w-7xl px-4 md:px-8

bottom_navigation.style: Fixed bottom, solid white background, top border (border-slate-200), pb-safe. Z-index 50.
bottom_navigation.items: Beranda, Katalog, Kalkulator, Bank Sampah, Vendor
bottom_navigation.active_state: Text and icon colored in Primary (Terracotta). Inactive is Text Secondary (Slate-500).

chips.style: Pill shape (rounded-full), px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all

cards.style: White background, rounded-2xl, subtle shadow, 1px border border-slate-100. Internal padding p-4 or p-6.

whatsapp_cta.style: Full width on mobile, rounded-xl, prominent. Can use #25D366 (WA Brand Color) specifically for the WA button to maintain user recognition, or stick to Primary CTA styling with WA icon.

image_urls.description: Clean civic utility illustration of an Indonesian neighborhood at daytime, terracotta and green tones. Used for Homepage Hero.
Top-down editorial photo of recyclable materials on a warm gray background. Used for Recycling Guides or Catalog Header.
Clean photo of an Indonesian local shop (warung). Used as a placeholder for Vendor/Bank Directory.
Jakarta skyline. Used for section backgrounds or location-specific empty states.
Brown paper bag. Good for recycling guide article covers.

domain_specific_rules.currency_format: Always format currency as 'Rp X.XXX/kg' (e.g., Rp 1.500/kg). Use dots for thousands separators, not commas.
domain_specific_rules.language: All placeholder text and UI copy MUST be in Bahasa Indonesia.
domain_specific_rules.map_integration: Use Google Maps Embed API (iframe-based) only, as requested. Do not attempt to use the JS SDK.
domain_specific_rules.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to EVERY interactive element (buttons, tabs, chips, form inputs, links) using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., data-testid='katalog-filter-plastik').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' and 'Figtree' from Google Fonts or standard imports.

Ensure the application layout strictly follows mobile-first dimensions. Wrapper main layout should simulate a mobile app view centered on desktop (max-w-md), but scale beautifully if standard responsive web is implemented.

Use standard Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Tabs, Dialogs, Select), but aggressively restyle them to match the defined 'Cards' and 'Chips' guidelines (rounded-2xl, specific shadows). Do NOT leave Shadcn components looking default 'Vercel-like'.
In the Home Page hero, use the 'hero_illustration' image. Do NOT apply heavy dark overlays; if text contrast is needed, use a soft bottom-to-top gradient.
For the directory filters, implement horizontal scrolling chip lists (overflow-x-auto, no-scrollbar) to mimic native mobile patterns.

Include a 'Bottom Navigation Bar' component fixed to the bottom of the screen on mobile viewports. Hide it on md: screens and above if adopting a desktop sidebar, otherwise keep it globally for PWA feel.
All navigation/CTAs that connect to vendors must use 'wa.me' deep links.
Ensure 'data-testid' is comprehensively applied to all components.
